inputs.label: Historical Demand Mean (units/period)
inputs.businessContext: Average demand observed over the past 12 periods (ISO 9001:2015 data collection).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average demand observed over the past 12 periods (ISO 9001:2015 data collection).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Son 12 dönemde gözlemlenen ortalama talep (ISO 9001:2015 veri toplama).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Bedarf der letzten 12 Perioden (ISO 9001:2015 Datenerhebung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Demande moyenne observée sur les 12 dernières périodes (collecte de données ISO 9001:2015).
businessContext_i18n.es: Demanda promedio observada en los últimos 12 períodos (recopilación de datos ISO 9001:2015).
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط الطلب الملاحظ خلال الـ 12 فترة الماضية (جمع البيانات وفق ISO 9001:2015).

inputs.label: Demand Standard Deviation (units)
inputs.businessContext: Standard deviation of demand, used for safety stock calculation (Lean Six Sigma DMAIC).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard deviation of demand, used for safety stock calculation (Lean Six Sigma DMAIC).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Talebin standart sapması, emniyet stoğu hesaplaması için kullanılır (Yalın Altı Sigma DMAIC).
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardabweichung des Bedarfs, verwendet für Sicherheitsbestand (Lean Six Sigma DMAIC).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart type de la demande, utilisé pour le calcul du stock de sécurité (Lean Six Sigma DMAIC).
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación estándar de la demanda, utilizada para el cálculo del stock de seguridad (Lean Seis Sigma DMAIC).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الانحراف المعياري للطلب، يستخدم لحساب مخزون الأمان (Six Sigma DMAIC اللين).

inputs.label: Lead Time (days)
inputs.businessContext: Average replenishment lead time from supplier (WERC DC Metrics).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average replenishment lead time from supplier (WERC DC Metrics).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarikçiden ortalama yenileme teslim süresi (WERC DC Metrikleri).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Wiederbeschaffungszeit vom Lieferanten (WERC DC Metriken).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Délai moyen de réapprovisionnement fournisseur (WERC DC Metrics).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo medio de reaprovisionamiento del proveedor (Métricas WERC de centro de distribución).
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط وقت التوريد للتجديد من المورد (مقاييس WERC للمستودعات).

inputs.label: Target Service Level
inputs.businessContext: Probability of not stocking out during lead time (Six Sigma DPMO target).

businessContext_i18n.en: Probability of not stocking out during lead time (Six Sigma DPMO target).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Teslim süresi boyunca stokta kalmama olasılığı (Altı Sigma DPMO hedefi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wahrscheinlichkeit, während der Lieferzeit keinen Fehlbestand zu haben (Six Sigma DPMO-Ziel).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Probabilité de ne pas être en rupture pendant le délai de livraison (cible DPMO Six Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.es: Probabilidad de no quedarse sin stock durante el tiempo de entrega (objetivo DPMO de Seis Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.ar: احتمال عدم نفاد المخزون خلال وقت التوريد (هدف DPMO لستة سيجما).

inputs.label: Unit Cost ($)
inputs.businessContext: Purchase cost per unit (ISO 14051 material flow cost accounting).

businessContext_i18n.en: Purchase cost per unit (ISO 14051 material flow cost accounting).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim başına satın alma maliyeti (ISO 14051 malzeme akış maliyet muhasebesi).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût d'achat par unité (comptabilité des flux de matières ISO 14051).
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de compra por unidad (contabilidad de costes de flujo de materiales ISO 14051).
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة الشراء لكل وحدة (محاسبة تدفق المواد ISO 14051).

inputs.label: Annual Holding Cost Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of unit cost per year (WERC DC Measures, typical 20-30%).

label_i18n.es: Tasa anual de coste de mantenimiento (%)

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of unit cost per year (WERC DC Measures, typical 20-30%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık birim maliyet yüzdesi (WERC DC Ölçüleri, tipik %20-30).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Stückkosten pro Jahr (WERC DC Kennzahlen, typisch 20-30%).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du coût unitaire par an (WERC DC Measures, typiquement 20-30%).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del coste unitario por año (Medidas WERC de centro de distribución, típicamente 20-30%).
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة مئوية من تكلفة الوحدة سنويًا (مقاييس WERC للمستودعات، عادة 20-30%).

inputs.label: Ordering Cost ($/order)
inputs.businessContext: Fixed cost per purchase order (Lean transactional cost reduction).

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed cost per purchase order (Lean transactional cost reduction).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satın alma emri başına sabit maliyet (Yalın işlem maliyeti azaltma).
businessContext_i18n.de: Fixe Kosten pro Bestellung (Lean transaktionale Kostenreduktion).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût fixe par bon de commande (réduction des coûts transactionnels Lean).
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste fijo por orden de compra (reducción de costes transaccionales Lean).
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكلفة الثابتة لكل أمر شراء (تقليل التكاليف اللينة في المعاملات).

inputs.label: Stockout Cost per Unit ($)
inputs.businessContext: Lost profit + penalty per unit of unmet demand (Six Sigma cost of poor quality).

label_i18n.es: Coste de rotura de stock por unidad ($)

businessContext_i18n.en: Lost profit + penalty per unit of unmet demand (Six Sigma cost of poor quality).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Karşılanamayan talep birimi başına kayıp kâr + ceza (Altı Sigma kalitesizlik maliyeti).
businessContext_i18n.de: Entgangener Gewinn + Strafe pro Einheit nicht gedeckter Nachfrage (Six Sigma Kosten schlechter Qualität).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Perte de profit + pénalité par unité de demande non satisfaite (coût de la non-qualité Six Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.es: Beneficio perdido + penalización por unidad de demanda insatisfecha (coste de mala calidad de Seis Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الربح المفقود + الغرامة لكل وحدة طلب غير مُلبى (تكلفة الجودة الرديئة وفقًا لستة سيجما).

rules.message: Historical demand mean must be greater than zero.
Lead time must be at least 1 day.
Service level must be between 90% and 99%.
All cost inputs must be positive.
Holding cost rate must be between 0% and 100%.
Periods per year must be at least 1.

thresholds.message: Safety stock is negative. Increase service level or reduce demand variability.
Total inventory cost exceeds 20% of annual product value. Consider reducing safety stock or lead time.
Inventory turnover is below 2. Review slow-moving items (ABC analysis recommended).
Data confidence is low. Consider collecting more historical data or using a different forecasting method.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
